column1: # Curated business-token -> change-document object-class map for /sap-change-history.
# (# comments + blank lines ignored.) token_aliases is `|`-separated (case-insensitive).
# The skill resolves the user's token to OBJECTCLAS, then builds OBJECTID from the key by
# ALPHA-converting per the key_element's DDIC output length (numeric keys get leading zeros;
# alphanumeric keys are left-justified space-padded). objectclas_s4_alt, when set, is queried
# ALSO. A raw `OBJECTCLAS:<class>` token bypasses this map. Every OBJECTCLAS below was
# validated present in live TCDOB on S4D (S/4HANA 1909) 2026-07-11.

column5: FI customer master (KNA1/KNB1/KNVV). On CVI S/4 some changes land under BUPA_* sub-objects (fragmented) — cross-check with `classes` if a change seems missing.
FI vendor master (LFA1/LFB1). CVI note as for customer.
